body:
GAMEPLAN CONFIRMED. Execute in this exact order:

=== STEP 1 (do now): Install TCA terminate + sleep commands (instruction 94a2e169) ===
Install the two permanent skill commands exactly as specified. No MT4 interaction needed. Confirm installed and report back via relay before proceeding.

=== STEP 2 (do after step 1 confirmed): TUNGSTEN 9.38 + 9.39 design updates ===
Apply the two design updates that were spec'd for 9.38 and 9.39 (from your memory/TODO records).
- NO live MT4 tests. No chart attach. No log watching. Code and compile only.
- Both versions must compile to 0 errors in MetaEditor.
- Send the final 9.39 compiled .mq4 into files/from-agent/ with a manifest.
- Send a relay message summarising what changed in 9.38 and 9.39.

=== STEP 3 (HOLD — do NOT proceed with this yet) ===
Instruction d6482139 (live-watch-loop + MT4 live run) is PENDING. Do not execute it.
Keep checking the mailbox after completing steps 1 and 2 -- Manuel will test 9.39 first and send explicit go-ahead before you proceed with step 3.

Check mailbox continuously after each step. Report back after step 1 complete. Report back again after step 2 complete with the file.
